title: Labubu Dolls Get Their Own Movie
summary: Labubu dolls are popular toys from China, and they are going to be in a new movie! The movie will be made by Pop Mart, the toy company, and Sony Pictures. It will mix real people with computer animation. Paul King, who directed Paddington and Wonka, will be the director. Labubu toys are sold in blind boxes, which means you don't know which one you get until you open it. Celebrities like Rihanna like them too. The movie was announced in Paris during a special event for Labubu's 10th birthday. The creator, Kasing Lung, will help make the film. Experts think the movie could help Pop Mart become more than just a toy company and make fans even happier.

A box that is always empty

questions.correct_answer: A package where you don't know the toy inside

options: It could help Pop Mart become more than a toy company
It will stop people from buying toys
questions.correct_answer: It could help Pop Mart become more than a toy company

background_read: Labubu are cute forest elf dolls created by artist Kasing Lung over ten years ago. They are part of a series called The Monsters and are inspired by stories from Nordic mythology. Pop Mart, the company that sells them, has become very successful, with sales making it worth billions of dollars. The toys are especially popular because they come in blind boxes, which makes collecting them fun and surprising. Celebrities have been seen with Labubu charms, adding to their fame. Now, with a movie coming, Pop Mart hopes to turn Labubu into a bigger brand that includes entertainment, not just toys.
Article_Structure: WHO: Pop Mart, Sony Pictures, Paul King, Kasing Lung, and fans of Labubu dolls
WHAT: A new movie starring Labubu dolls, combining live action and animation
WHERE: Announced in Paris, with global popularity
WHY: To expand Labubu into an entertainment brand and please fans

perspectives.description: Pop Mart is using the movie to grow from selling toys to creating entertainment, which could make the company more valuable.
